# nd_multi_cluster_connectivity (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_type` (String) Specify a Nexus Dashboard or APIC cluster
- `hostname` (String) IP address or FQDN used to onboard the cluster. For ND clusters, using an FQDN will enable cross-launch to this cluster from other ND clusters using an FQDN.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password for authentication with the remote cluster
- `username` (String) Username for authentication with the remote cluster

### Optional

- `cluster_name` (String) Name of the remote cluster as reported by the API
- `force_remove` (Boolean) Ensures removal will succeed in the case the remote cluster is not healthy or communicable
- `latitude` (Number) Latitude in decimal degrees
- `license_tier` (String) Tier of license to be used with this fabric on this cluster
- `login_domain` (String) Login domain for authentication with the remote cluster
- `longitude` (Number) Longitude in decimal degrees
- `multi_cluster_login_domain_name` (String) When set, ND will create a login domain on the local cluster and the cluster to be registered. The new login domain will enable cross-launch between clusters without an external authentication provider.
- `orchestration_status` (String) Desired status of the orchestration feature for APIC cluster
- `re_register` (Boolean) Performs onboarding with the cluster again, without needing to remove the cluster
- `security_domain` (String) Security domain access for the APIC cluster
- `telemetry_epg` (String) APIC End Point Group (EPG) Distinguished Name (DN) for telemetry
- `telemetry_network` (String) Desired connectivity for network traffic (telemetry)
- `telemetry_status` (String) Desired status of the telemetry feature for APIC cluster
- `telemetry_streaming_protocol` (String) Telemetry Streaming Protocol
- `verify_ca` (Boolean) Verify APIC CA using one of the trusted CAs configured on the Nexus Dashboard

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Terraform resource ID, set to the cluster name for ease of use.
- `local` (Boolean) For ND, this cluster is the local cluster. For APIC, this cluster is managed by the local cluster.
- `primary_cluster` (Boolean) This cluster manages all connected ND or APIC clusters
- `state` (String) Status of the cluster
- `version` (String) Version of the remote cluster
- `virtual` (Boolean) This is a virtual cluster
